seoTitle: Tuan vs Tuchekoi — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tuan and Tuchekoi. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tuan and Tuchekoi.
heading: Tuan vs Tuchekoi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tuan, Queensland and Tuchekoi, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tuan and Tuchekoi have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Tuan or Tuchekoi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tuan has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Tuchekoi scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tuan scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Tuchekoi scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tuan or Tuchekoi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tuan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
